title: Overworld Vanilla Structures
description: 🏕️ 5 vanilla-style overworld structures with /locate support, improved visuals, and richer loot.
body:
# 🏕️ Overworld Vanilla Structures

Bring fresh exploration to the Overworld with 5 handcrafted structures that blend into vanilla terrain and survival pacing.

## ✨ Included Structures
- 🔥 **Ruined Camp** (`/locate structure camp`)
- 🗼️ **Watchtower Ruin** (`/locate structure tower`)
- 🏡 **Hunter Cabin** (`/locate structure cabin`)
- 🔱 **Stone Shrine** (`/locate structure shrine`)
- 🕳️ **Abandoned Well** (`/locate structure well`)

## 🧭 Why It Feels Vanilla+
- Terrain-aware placement in new chunks
- Deterministic generation per world seed
- Balanced loot for early/mid survival progression
- Clean structure silhouettes with natural block palettes

## 🔎 Locate Support
Use vanilla-style locate syntax:
- `/locate structure camp`
- `/locate structure tower`
- `/locate structure cabin`
- `/locate structure shrine`
- `/locate structure well`

## ⚙️ Technical
- Java 17
- Paper API 1.20.4
- Data saved in `plugins/OverworldVanillaStructures/structures.yml`
